scenes.text: A small shelter, somewhere in America...

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: Mark, where am I? I'm scared in here... cold.
Mark never came back.

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: Why did he leave me here? What did I do wrong?
A few days later, a man walks in...

scenes.speaker: Man
scenes.text: Hmm... what about this one? No, no... I want a purebred. What about that golden retriever over there?

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: Everyone wants the purebreds... they don't want what I am. I don't even know what I am. Maybe a Pomeranian? Maybe a terrier?
A few months pass...
Daisy wakes up. The shelter is nearly empty. She's the last one.

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: Everyone else got picked... everyone but me.
The door opens. A brunette girl walks in.

scenes.speaker: Shelter Man
scenes.text: This is the last one we have, ma'am. This mutt.

scenes.speaker: Girl
scenes.text: What breed is she?

scenes.speaker: Shelter Man
scenes.text: Honestly? We have no idea. Some kind of mix.

scenes.speaker: Girl
scenes.text: Any health issues?

scenes.speaker: Shelter Man
scenes.text: Unknown. She's been here a while though.

scenes.speaker: Girl
scenes.text: Does she... have teeth?

scenes.speaker: Shelter Man
scenes.text: I think... one?

scenes.speaker: Girl
scenes.text: OMG SHE'S PERFECT! I love her! I'll keep her forever!

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: So... you're my new mommy?
~ That night, Daisy dreams... ~
Walking in the park with mommy...
Sleeping in a warm bed...
Getting her very first Greenie...
Daisy wakes up.

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: Wait... where's mommy? She's... GONE?!

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: My mommy saved me from the shelter... and now I need to save her!

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: Those Amazon guys were tough! But nothing will stop me from finding mommy!
Daisy ventures into the neighborhood...

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: So many wiener dogs! But I made it through. Mommy has to be close...
A green cheek parrot lands on Daisy's head.

scenes.speaker: Parrot
scenes.text: *SQUAWK* I know where your mommy is! Follow me! We have to fly through the hoops!

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: But... I'm a dog. I can't fly!

scenes.speaker: Parrot
scenes.text: Hold onto my feet! Let's GO!
Daisy finds her mommy!

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: MOMMY!! I found you! I was so scared!

scenes.speaker: Mommy
scenes.text: Daisy! My brave little mutt! I knew you'd find me!

scenes.speaker: Daisy
scenes.text: I love you, mommy. Forever and ever.

Dedicated to the unwanted dogs of this world
and those that have come to love them.
T H A N K   Y O U   F O R   P L A Y I N G
